confirmedDefects.title: Server accepts negative drug quantity in prescription lines
confirmedDefects.preconditions: Authenticated user with create permission; valid patient and product exist.
steps: Create prescription header via JSON-RPC with a valid patient_id.
Read created record to verify invalid value persistence.
confirmedDefects.expected: Server rejects prescription line when quantity <= 0.
confirmedDefects.actual: Record is created and persisted with quantity=-1.
confirmedDefects.businessImpact: Patient-safety risk: unsafe medication quantity can propagate to prescription workflows.

confirmedDefects.title: Server accepts negative billing unit price
confirmedDefects.preconditions: Authenticated user with create permission; valid patient and billing header exist.
steps: Create billing header via JSON-RPC with valid patient_id.
Read created record to verify invalid value persistence.
confirmedDefects.expected: Server rejects billing line when price < 0.
confirmedDefects.actual: Record is created and persisted with price=-1000.
confirmedDefects.businessImpact: Financial integrity risk impacting invoicing trust and downstream settlement.

confirmedDefects.title: Server accepts negative doctor experience
confirmedDefects.expected: Server rejects doctor profile when experience < 0.
confirmedDefects.actual: Doctor record is created with experience=-1.
confirmedDefects.businessImpact: Data integrity degradation in provider master data used for care assignment context.

confirmedDefects.title: Server accepts clinically implausible dosage text without guardrails
confirmedDefects.preconditions: Authenticated user; valid patient, prescription header, and product exist.
steps: Create prescription header with valid patient_id.
Call /web/dataset/call_kw/healthplix.prescription.line/create with dosage='9999 mg every 1 minute' and quantity=1.
confirmedDefects.expected: Server enforces dosage guardrails or blocks unsafe dosage strings.
confirmedDefects.actual: Record is created with clinically implausible dosage text.
confirmedDefects.businessImpact: Patient-safety risk from unchecked dosage instructions entering prescribing workflow.
